title: CatBoost stability repeat beside two-seed RealMLP
summary: Repeat the CatBoost-only expert test with a different CatBoost seed or minimally changed CatBoost parameters while preserving the two-seed RealMLP parent.
rationale: CatBoost was positive in the clean root-level test, but it should be repeated to separate a stable signal from a lucky seed. The goal is stability evidence, not a broader model stack.
implementation_hint: Start from the parent two-seed RealMLP average code. Add a CatBoost expert on the same folds and features with a different CatBoost random seed or one minimal regularization change. Report CatBoost OOF AUC, its correlation with the RealMLP core, and a low-weight blend. Do not add XGBoost, LightGBM, stacking, calibration, or feature engineering.
expected_effect: Confirm CatBoost as a reliable complementary expert if the repeat remains positive or improves the low-weight blend.
risk: The earlier CatBoost gain may not reproduce and the extra model may add only noise.
